items.title: [Krawcyznski] The Wolves do still have other moves in the works. They need a power forward and they need more shooting. I am told that they are not trading Donte DiVincenzo. The work continues.
items.author: YujiDomainExpansion
items.body_excerpt: Source: https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/7392552/2026/06/25/lamelo-ball-traded-timberwolves-hornets/?source=user\_shared\_article&unlocked\_article\_code=1.s1A.i2mU.IxPBJrFN94PA The Wolves do still have other moves in the works. They need a power forward and they need more…

items.title: people keep talking about the wolves expanding the randle deal for lamelo while including donte divincenzo and draft picks. they have *one* tradeable first-rounder. i refuse to believe lamelo's value is that low.
items.author: dan favale
items.body_excerpt: people keep talking about the wolves expanding the randle deal for lamelo while including donte divincenzo and draft picks. they have *one* tradeable first-rounder. i refuse to believe lamelo's value is that low.
